title: Feature request: Operate multiple remote desktop functions simultaneously and in parallel !
author: dakangsiji
body_snippet:
## Expected Behavior
Provide a tool to operate multiple remote desktops simultaneously and in parallel

## Context
Hello, although various current remote desktop tools can realize the use of remote desktop services, they only realize the serial method to operate each windows server. No any tools real realizes the function of parallel operation of multiple servers at the same time.
that is a group operation. 
In this scenario, a client needs to do the same thing on multiple remote desktops ...

iterations.description: Feature request for simultaneous/parallel RDP group control is interesting but lacks concrete specification, implementation details, and confirmation it's still wanted by the community.
Repass confirmed: Parallel input to multiple RDP sessions requires major architectural changes

comments.author: VShawn
comments.snippet:
Hi, I think it is possible, I once saw group control feature based RDP in a closed-source software, I saved a video of it. 

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/684f2e21-2345-40d0-b817-9a51605a9e4b

I tried add the feature to my app but failed, as it’s closed-source, I dont know how they achieved it.

bad news: I can't find the closed-source app now.

notes: Feature: operate multiple RDP sessions simultaneously (parallel input). Major architectural feature.
